use_cases: Displaying live statistics and metrics on analytics dashboards
Showing incrementing counters for user engagement numbers on landing pages
Presenting elapsed time or duration in a visually engaging format
Highlighting product sales or download counts with animated updates
Creating urgency by showing real-time inventory or limited offer counts
ai_summary: A dark-themed animated number flip counter that displays incrementing numbers with smooth flip animations. Features a neon green accent on black backgrounds with monospace typography and subtle glow effects. Commonly used to display live statistics, metrics, or timers on SaaS dashboards and marketing landing pages to create visual engagement and convey activity.
